meaning: n.[蛹ｻ]逧ｱ郤ｹ蛻匀勁譛ｯ 謨ｴ螳ｹ譛ｯ
examples: Objective: to explore the new method of prolonging the long-dated result of rhytidectomy.
Objective The application of the simple, safe and effective barbed thread in facial rhytidectomy.
Objective: to provide anatomic basis for the selection of cut position and apart plane in forehead rhytidectomy.
